nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT asa.script_id, au1.code AS campus_code, au1.name AS campus_name, au2.code AS exam_campus_code, au2.name AS exam_campus_name
FROM   script_assignment asa
JOIN   answer_script asa_script ON asa_script.id = asa.script_id
JOIN   academic_unit au1 ON au1.id = asa_script.course_id
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.exam_id = asa_script.exam_id
JOIN   academic_unit au2 ON au2.id = esc.campus_id
WHERE  au1.id <> au2.id
ORDER  BY au1.code ASC, au2.code ASC, asa_script.exam_id ASC
LIMIT  1000;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: for SELECT DISTINCT, ORDER BY expressions must appear in select list
LINE 1: ...id <> au2.id ORDER BY au1.code ASC, au2.code ASC, asa_script...
                                                             ^
